question: [File: 'File Name: rest/topicmessage.js -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getTopicMessages()] Can an unprivileged external user repeatedly send requests to /topics/:topicId with the maximum allowed `limit` value, causing the DB to execute full-table scans on `topic_message` for a high-volume topic, degrading query performance for all other legitimate users sharing the same DB connection pool?
